title: AI-SDLC Untrusted-PR Report (v1)
description: RFC-0043 §Stage 4 unsigned report artifact produced by the OpenShell sandbox (Stages 2-3) and consumed by the clean-room signer. Deliberately aligned with the existing reviewer verdict contract (severity-gated, NOT confidence-scored). No top-level confidenceScore / complexityDelta / cveDetected fields.

schemaVersion.description: Pinned schema version identifier — rejected by the signer if mismatched.

headSha.description: 40-hex-char commit SHA at the PR head.

baseSha.description: 40-hex-char commit SHA of the merge base.

generatedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the sandbox produced this report.

reason.description: Human-readable reason string for the trust classification.

astGate.description: Stage 1 deterministic diff / AST gate result.

outcome.description: Gate outcome. Reports reaching Stage 4 should have 'pass'.

offendingPaths.description: Paths that triggered abort (empty when outcome is 'pass').

upstreamSuitePassed.description: True when the trusted upstream test suite passes on the patched tree.

newTestsPassed.description: True when the contributor's newly added tests all pass.

newCodeCoveragePct.description: Coverage percentage of new code paths by the contributor's new tests.

consensus.description: Aggregated consensus from all three reviewers.

approved.description: True when no reviewer has blocking (critical or major) findings.

blockingFindings.description: Total count of critical + major findings across all reviewers.

ReviewerVerdict.description: Single reviewer verdict aligned with the existing AI-SDLC verdict contract (severity-gated, not confidence-scored).

approved.description: True when this reviewer has no blocking (critical or major) findings.

findings.description: Ordered list of findings from this reviewer.

promptInjectionDetected.description: True when this reviewer detected a prompt-injection attempt in the diff. Surfaces the attempt as a finding rather than obeying it.

Finding.description: A single finding from a reviewer, aligned with the existing AI-SDLC severity vocabulary.

severity.description: Severity level. critical + major are blocking; minor + suggestion are informational.

path.description: Optional repo-relative file path this finding applies to.
